input.initialPrompt: Modernize this project to SDK-style format. Identify all legacy patterns and suggest how to simplify the project file.

data.content:
Here's the analysis of legacy patterns and the modernized SDK-style project:

## Legacy Patterns Identified

| # | Legacy Pattern | SDK-Style Resolution |
|---|---|---|
| 1 | `<Project ToolsVersion="15.0" xmlns="...">` | Use `<Project Sdk="Microsoft.NET.Sdk">` |
| 2 | Explicit `Import` of `Microsoft.Common.props` / `Microsoft.CSharp.targets` | Handled automatically by SDK |
| 3 | `Configuration`/`Platform` conditional defaults | Built-in SDK defaults |
| 4 | `ProjectGuid` | Not needed |
| 5 | `FileAlignment`, `Deterministic` | SDK defaults |
| 6 | Debug/Release `PropertyGroup` conditionals | SDK provides sensible defaults |
| 7 | Explicit `<Reference>` for System assemblies | Implicit with framework targeting |
| 8 | Explicit `<Compile Include="...">` | Implicit file globbing |
| 9 | `Properties/AssemblyInfo.cs` | Auto-generated; metadata moves to `.csproj` |
| 10 | `TargetFrameworkVersion v4.7.2` | Use `<TargetFramework>net472</TargetFramework>` |

Now let me apply the modernization:

arguments.old_str:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<Project ToolsVersion="15.0" xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/developer/msbuild/2003">
  <Import Project="$(MSBuildExtensionsPath)\$(MSBuildToolsVersion)\Microsoft.Common.props" Condition="Exists('$(MSBuildExtensionsPath)\$(MSBuildToolsVersion)\Microsoft.Common.props')" />
  <PropertyGroup>
    <Configuration Condition=" '$(Configuration)' == '' ">Debug</Configuration>
    <Platform Condition=" '$(Platform)' == '' ">AnyCPU</Platform>
    <ProjectGuid>{12345678-1234-1234-1234-123456789012}</ProjectGuid>
    <OutputType>Library</OutputType>
    <RootNamespace>LegacyApp</RootNamespace>
    <AssemblyName>LegacyApp</AssemblyName>
    <TargetFrameworkVersion>v4.7.2</TargetFrameworkVersion>
    <FileAlignment>512</FileAlignment>
    <AutoGenerateBindingRedirects>true</AutoGenerateBindingRedirects>
    <Deterministic>true</Deterministic>
  </PropertyGroup>
  <PropertyGroup Condition=" '$(Configuration)|$(Platform)' == 'Debug|AnyCPU' ">
    <DebugSymbols>true</DebugSymbols>
    <DebugType>full</DebugType>
    <Optimize>false</Optimize>
    <OutputPath>bin\Debug\</OutputPath>
    <DefineConstants>DEBUG;TRACE</DefineConstants>
    <ErrorReport>prompt</ErrorReport>
    <WarningLevel>4</WarningLevel>
  </PropertyGroup>
  <PropertyGroup Condition=" '$(Configuration)|$(Platform)' == 'Release|AnyCPU' ">
    <DebugType>pdbonly</DebugType>
    <Optimize>true</Optimize>
    <OutputPath>bin\Release\</OutputPath>
    <DefineConstants>TRACE</DefineConstants>
    <ErrorReport>prompt</ErrorReport>
    <WarningLevel>4</WarningLevel>
  </PropertyGroup>
  <ItemGroup>
    <Reference Include="System" />
    <Reference Include="System.Core" />
    <Reference Include="System.Data" />
    <Reference Include="System.Xml" />
    <Reference Include="System.Xml.Linq" />
    <Reference Include="Microsoft.CSharp" />
  </ItemGroup>
  <ItemGroup>
    <Compile Include="Calculator.cs" />
    <Compile Include="StringHelper.cs" />
    <Compile Include="Properties\AssemblyInfo.cs" />
  </ItemGroup>
  <Import Project="$(MSBuildToolsPath)\Microsoft.CSharp.targets" />
</Project>
arguments.new_str:
<Project Sdk="Microsoft.NET.Sdk">

  <PropertyGroup>
    <TargetFramework>net472</TargetFramework>
    <RootNamespace>LegacyApp</RootNamespace>
    <AssemblyName>LegacyApp</AssemblyName>
    <Description>A legacy-style project for modernization testing</Description>
    <Company>TestCo</Company>
    <Product>LegacyApp</Product>
    <Copyright>Copyright © 2024</Copyright>
    <Version>1.0.0.0</Version>
  </PropertyGroup>

</Project>

data.reasoningText:
Now I have a full picture of the legacy project. Let me identify all the legacy patterns and explain how to modernize it to SDK-style format.

Legacy patterns found:
1. **Old-style `<Project>` element** with `ToolsVersion` and `xmlns` — replaced by `<Project Sdk="Microsoft.NET.Sdk">`
2. **Explicit `Import` of `Microsoft.Common.props` and `Microsoft.CSharp.targets`** — SDK-style handles this automatically
3. **Explicit `Configuration`/`Platform` property defaults** — SDK-style provides these by default
4. **`ProjectGuid`** — not needed in SDK-style


5. **`FileAlignment`, `AutoGenerateBindingRedirects`, and `Deterministic`** — all have sensible defaults in SDK-style
6. **Debug/Release conditionals** — SDK-style already sets DebugSymbols, DebugType, Optimize, OutputPath, DefineConstants, ErrorReport, and WarningLevel appropriately
7. **Explicit System assembly references** — unnecessary for modern .NET targets (net6.0+), though needed if staying on .NET Framework with the `TargetFramework` property
8. **Implicit file inclusion** — SDK-style automatically globs Compile items instead of requiring explicit declarations
9. **Assembly metadata** — moves from `Properties/AssemblyInfo.cs` to the .csproj `PropertyGroup` since SDK-style auto-generates these attributes
10. **Target framework** — switching from `TargetFrameworkVersion` v4.7.2 to `TargetFramework` net472, or better yet, upgrading to net6.0 or net8.0

Now I'm ready to start the modernization process.

    <Company>TestCo</Company>
    <Product>LegacyApp</Product>
    <Copyright>Copyright © 2024</Copyright>
    <Version>1.0.0.0</Version>
  </PropertyGroup>

</Project>

data.content:
Done. The project went from **47 lines → 14 lines**. Here's a summary of what was removed/simplified:

- **`Properties/AssemblyInfo.cs`** → metadata now lives in `<PropertyGroup>` (auto-generated at build)
- **Explicit `<Compile>` items** → SDK uses implicit globbing (all `*.cs` included automatically)
- **System `<Reference>` items** → implicit with `net472` target framework
- **Debug/Release conditional PropertyGroups** → SDK provides correct defaults
- **`ProjectGuid`, `FileAlignment`, `Deterministic`, `OutputType`** → all default/unnecessary
- **`Import` statements** → handled by `Sdk="Microsoft.NET.Sdk"`

If you later want to target modern .NET, just change `<TargetFramework>net472</TargetFramework>` to e.g. `net8.0`.
